title: UI6/UI7 — Logs + Sessions read-only tailing over the real ~/.claude

tests.summary: 8 passed — list logs/** + debug/** + top-level *.log; list sessions/*.json + projects/**/*.jsonl; line/byte-capped tail; path-traversal + category-scope + symlink-escape rejection (all routed through the claude-home seam)

typecheck.summary: 0 errors (new lib + 2 api routes + ReadOnlyTailPanel + [type] wiring)

lint.summary: deferred to the global gate (project-wide shared-runtime gate)

e2e.summary: 2 passed vs sandbox — Logs lists daemon.log + audit.log and tails 'daemon serving'; Sessions lists transcript.jsonl + 9937.json and tails the pid JSON; zero console errors; existing quarters spec still green

designAudit.notes: identical shell idiom — serif h1, muted lead, READ-ONLY pill, bordered white master/detail cards, mono filenames + tail <pre>, lucide sidebar icons, no emoji

video.note: walkthrough skill: 6/6 beats vision-verified (captions exact + screens matched) AND functional Playwright asserts 0 failures; recorded against the seeded SANDBOX dev server (read-only-safe, never the live ~/.claude). This is the verified narrated video the prior S1-S5 run lacked.

notes: New: src/lib/claude-logs.ts (read-only tailing), src/app/api/quarters/{logs,sessions}/route.ts, src/components/quarters/ReadOnlyTailPanel.tsx; wired in src/app/quarters/[type]/page.tsx; sandbox seed extended (tests/e2e/sandbox.ts) with logs + sessions + a transcript. The Compose reframe half of UI6/UI7 is deferred (logged in decisions.md).
